docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED FEB-24-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ERCI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SEAN DONOVAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC SHAW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DONOVAN, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ERCI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONOVAN, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, ERCI $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
